Introduction
    The Scorpion King teams up with a warrior named Tala, who is the sister of The Nubian King. Together they search for a legendary relic known as The Book of Souls, which will allow them to put an end to an evil warlord.

Also known as: Vua Bọ Cạp 5: Quyển Sách Linh Hồn
